raw_title: Book Review: ‘Stolen Revolution,’ by Yeganeh Torbati and Bozorgmehr Sharafedin
book_title: ‘Stolen Revolution,’ by Yeganeh Torbati and Bozorgmehr Sharafedin
description: In a quietly devastating new book, two journalists chart the protest movements fighting for change inside the country.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘What Came West,’ by Josh Weil
description: Josh Weil’s new novel follows an autistic trapper on an odyssey during the California gold rush.
Set in the decades after the Great Hunger, “Land” is a rich portrait of family life amid Ireland’s long struggle against British rule.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Fire Agent,’ by David Baerwald
description: “The Fire Agent,” by David Baerwald, is a historical novel that spans two continents and world wars.
